name: lastdays
description: Research what people actually said about a topic over the last N days (default 30, configurable). Zero-key engine for Reddit, Hacker News, GitHub, Stack Overflow, Lemmy, Bluesky, Polymarket, and Kalshi with real engagement, plus agent-driven web/X/Chinese layers. Also a demand-mining mode (--mode demand / demandmine skill) that surfaces unmet-need and startup-opportunity signals. Claude + OpenAI, subscription-friendly, no API key required.
